name: typography-inline-code
visual_summary: This is a typography component for inline code snippets. It renders a fixed-width code block with a monospaced font, making it ideal for highlighting and readability. This component is useful for documentation, API references, or code snippets within an article.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready typography component with the following characteristics:

Name: typography-inline-code
Description: This is a typography component for inline code snippets. It renders a fixed-width code block with a monospaced font, making it ideal for highlighting and readability. This component is useful for documentation, API references, or code snippets within an article.
Style: light
Interactions: static
Tags: typography, code, documentation, api-reference

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
